message:
fix: wire ConnectorErrorMapping for 11 connectors, harden cron/hue/core crates, and add tagged CBOR support

Multi-agent accumulated fixes verified and committed as a cohesive batch:

Connector error module wiring (11 connectors):
- bluebubbles, brave-search, deepgram, elevenlabs, exa, mistral,
  openrouter, tavily, tlon, zalo, zalouser: add error.rs with
  ConnectorErrorMapping trait impl, wire pub mod error + re-export
  in lib.rs, add thiserror + fcp-sdk deps to Cargo.toml

Connector improvements:
- cron: structured HandshakeResponse/HealthSnapshot, manifest hash
  via SHA256, uptime tracking, fixed self_check status assertion
- hue: expand error.rs with RateLimited/NotConfigured variants,
  full ConnectorErrorMapping impl with 12 tests
- discord: use finish_non_exhaustive() in Debug impl, doc comment
- slack: fix test config key names (bot_token→token, api_url→base_url)

Core crate fixes:
- fcp-crypto: accept tagged CBOR COSE_Sign1 in CoseToken::from_cbor()
- fcp-raptorq: use BTreeMap for deterministic symbol reconstruction order
- fcp-conformance: refactor symbol verification into helper method
- fcp-host: correct supply_chain test assertions for fail-closed policy
- fcp-e2e: simplify cron compliance to use connector's structured responses
- fwc: add tagged capability token tests, capabilities offline source test,
  reclassify command counts in readiness tests

All changes verified on remote workers vmi1152480/vmi1227854.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
